title: Managed physical transfer with quarantine and retention
objective: Implement approved physical transfer into managed_fs with copy, verify, metadata commit, source quarantine and controlled purge.
non_goals: Do not purge source files immediately after copy.
Do not move files that have unresolved ACL, secret or sensitivity conflicts.
Do not implement S3 backend in MVP unless separately approved.
Do not store move manifests in repository root.
requirements: Managed copy must be verified by sha256 and size.
Metadata and index updates must happen after verification.
Source deletion must go through quarantine and retention.
Purge must require backup checkpoint or explicit policy override.
Failure must stop before deletion and surface in review.
acceptance_checks: Approved move copies the file, verifies hash and updates current physical placement.
Hash mismatch leaves the source intact and creates a blocker issue.
Source file is not purged before retention and backup checkpoint.
Re-running the same move job does not create duplicate placements.
